case_title: BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. VS. HELEN WONG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG, HELEN ALTHOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD ADDITIONAL DAMAGES, THE COURT ORDERS THAT PLAINTIFF SHALL KEEP THE INITIAL $1,150.00 DOWN PAYMENT, AND RETAIN POSSESSION OF THE SUBJECT FURNITURE.
